resources.string: Typing it now and then helps you remember it, and we ask less often over time. There is no way to recover your vault if you forget it.
That\'s not your password. Try again.

plurals.name: password_reminder_next_days
plurals.item: We\'ll check in again in %d day.
We\'ll check in again in %d days.
We\'ll check in again in %d days.
We\'ll check in again in %d days.
